1.description: Fetch Lillestrøm municipality geometry and kommunenummer

2.description: Fetch quick-clay hazard areas (polygons) for Lillestrøm municipality

3.description: Fetch parcels (teig) intersecting quick-clay hazard areas in Lillestrøm

4.description: Fetch 1 km grid cells covering Lillestrøm municipality

5.description: Spatial join: parcels (from step 3) within grid cells (from step 4)

7.description: Sort grid cells by parcel count descending

replan_trigger.error: Step 3 exhausted SQL repair budget (2 attempts).

AND EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM kvikkleire_175185730654415d8841436d0d6999f2.utlosningomr k
    WHERE ST_Intersects(t.omrade, k.omrade)
);
